summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Planora calendar app new features: PWA service worker, recurring events, and Share Your Planora functionality. All major features working correctly with excellent implementation quality.

design_issues.issue: User sessions expire during extended testing, requiring re-authentication
design_issues.note: Normal session timeout behavior, not a functional bug

passed_tests: Service worker registration (/service-worker.js loads successfully)
PWA offline capability implementation
Share page (/share) loads with complete functionality
QR code generation and display on Share page
Download card button functionality on Share page
Copy booking link button on Share page
Copy embed code button on Share page
Embed code preview button on Share page
EventModal recurrence dropdown (none/daily/weekly/monthly)
EventModal recurrence end date input appears correctly
Creating events with recurrence saves correctly (POST /api/events)
Recurring events expand and display on calendar with repeat icons
Calendar month view shows 28 event pills with 26 repeat icons
Calendar week view shows 17 events with drag-and-drop capability
Calendar day view shows 3 events with drag-and-drop capability
Drag-and-drop: event pills are draggable (non-recurring events)
Sidebar has Share navigation link
Theme toggle functionality
User registration and authentication flow
All previous features still working (auth, calendar views, tasks, availability, booking)
Backend recurring events API (daily/weekly/monthly recurrence types)
Backend recurrence data storage and retrieval
All 28 backend API tests passing (events, tasks, auth, availability, bookings)

success_percentage.backend: 100% (28/28 API tests passed including new recurring events)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All new features working: PWA service worker, Share page, recurring events UI, drag-and-drop capability)
